payload.label: window
payload.long_description: Dark rectangular reflective glass window showing a dim interior reflection (table lamp, staircase, faint seated silhouette); surface appears glossy and slightly blurred in low light, with visible glare and halo around the lamp; the window is partially cropped by the image edges. Approximate distance from camera ~1.5 m.
